name: grill-with-team
description: Codex-native domain grilling workflow with bundled planning, triage, diagnosis, TDD, prototype, and issue-slicing skills.

interface.shortDescription: Stress-test plans with a Codex-native agent team.
interface.longDescription: Grill With Team packages a Codex-native domain-grilling workflow, HTML context artifacts, internal role playbooks, and companion engineering skills for PRDs, issue slicing, triage, diagnosis, TDD, prototypes, and zoomed-out code maps.
defaultPrompt: Grill this plan with the team.
Set up Matt Pocock-style agent skills for this repo.
